extensionLaligagate.title: Extension LaLigaGate
extensionLaligagate.subtitle: Fighting censorship through technology
extensionLaligagate.shortDescription: Browser extension to combat judicial blocks and promote internet freedom.
extensionLaligagate.viewProjectTitle: Click to see more project details

about.title: About the Extension
about.description: Extension LaLigaGate is a browser extension developed as a digital activism tool against the massive judicial blocks implemented by LaLiga in Spain. This extension helps users understand the impact of internet censorship and provides tools to fight for digital rights and freedom.

features.title: Key Features
features.feature1: Detection of blocked websites and display of information about judicial blocks
features.feature3: Educational content about digital rights and internet freedom

howToUse.title: How to Use
howToUse.description: The extension is designed to be intuitive and simple to use:
howToUse.step1: Install the extension from the Chrome Web Store or GitHub
howToUse.step2: The extension will be activated automatically in your browser
howToUse.step3: Browse normally - the extension will alert you when you encounter blocked content
howToUse.step4: Access the extension's dashboard to view statistics and learn more about internet censorship

resources.title: Resources and Information
resources.description: For more information about the judicial blocks, their impact, and ways to get involved in digital activism, visit the LaLigaGate section of this website. This extension is part of a broader movement to promote internet freedom and digital rights.

laligagate.title: #laligagate
laligagate.intro: is not just a hashtag. It's an alarm — a call to rethink what kind of internet we want: one ruled by the interests of a few, or one where digital rights and fair access to content are fundamental pillars.

warning.title: ⚠️ This site is affected by LaLiga's blocks
warning.description: This website is among the thousands of URLs blocked by LaLiga in its effort to stop piracy. An indiscriminate blocking that affects legitimate sites like this one, showing the serious consequences of these disproportionate measures.

problem.title: The problem of mass blockings
problem.description: The court-ordered blockings requested by LaLiga have resulted in:

points.censorshipDesc: Thousands of domains affected without individual review
points.rightsDesc: Freedom of expression and access to information compromised
points.falsePositivesDesc: News sites, personal blogs and educational projects censored

imageCaption.hayahora: - Tool to track LaLiga's mass blockings and let any user check whether a website has been unfairly blocked.
imageCaption.judicial: DIGI message when trying to access content after an IP is blocked during football matches.

impact.title: The real impact on my projects
impact.description: This website is a clear example of the collateral damage caused by these measures. As a developer and content creator, my personal site has been blocked despite having no relation to sports piracy.

merequetenge.name: Merequetenge
merequetenge.description: Multipurpose Discord bot for music, economy and entertainment. A legitimate project partially blocked unjustly.

farlands.name: Farlands Editor

impact.massiveBlocks: Massive blockings do not only affect alleged piracy — they create a domino effect that harms:

damages.trust: Trust in the internet as a free space

callToAction.title: What can we do?
callToAction.description: It is essential that, as users, we are aware of this problem and demand:
